rationale: No corpus points, no real early-stage per-company anchor found. Generic market commentary ('senior/principal can command up to $200K+ base') is loosely consistent with the file's L5 base p50 ($176K) but is not tier-specific or level-specific enough to raise confidence. This looks like a genuinely underdocumented market segment (early-stage startups rarely name a dedicated 'senior consulting/PS engineer' role with disclosed comp) rather than a research gap I could close with more effort in this pass. Keeping low.
